# comparison_postgres_process_rss__Hikari_J.png

Numbers used in the chart.

## Axis 1

- title: PostgreSQL server process RSS (db_proc_metrics.csv) — Hikari J

- x_label: Time since sample start (s)

- y_label: rss_mb
